title: $:/plugins/xp/aggregation-checklist
name: Checklist
author: kl
text:

checklistText={{$:/config/NewChecklist/Text}}> <$wikify name="checklistTitle" text="""<$macrocall $name="now" format=<>/>"""> <$reveal type="nomatch" state=<> text=""> <$action-sendmessage "},"$:/xp/ui/Buttons/new-checklist":{"title":"$:/xp/ui/Buttons/new-checklist","caption":"{{$:/xp/images/new-checklist}} new checklist","description":"Create a new checklist","text":"\whitespace trim filter="[match[yes]]"> new checklist "},"CHECKLIST":{"title":"CHECKLIST","caption":"{{$:/xp/images/checklist}} $param=""".xp-search-checklist input"""/> \define defaultView() $:/config/xp/aggregation-checklist/DefaultView \define checklistViewButton() \whitespace trim <$reveal state=<> default="toc" type="nomatch" text="manager"> <$button tooltip="Switching to manager view" class="tc-btn-invisible tc-btn-mini"> <$action-setfield $tiddler=<> text="manager"/> {{$:/xp/images/switch}} <$reveal state=<> type="match" text="manager"> <$button tooltip="Switching to toc view" class="tc-btn-invisible tc-btn-mini"> <$action-setfield $tiddler=<> text="toc"/> {{$:/xp/images/switch}} \end \define doneTiddler() $:/temp/xp/aggregation-checklist/Done \define showDoneButton() \whitespace trim <$list filter="[tagtag[done]!has[draft.of]limit[1]]" variable="ignore"> <$reveal state=<> type="nomatch" text="show"> <$button tooltip="View completed checklist" class="tc-btn-invisible tc-btn-mini"> <$action-setfield $tiddler=<> text="show"/> {{$:/core/images/done-button}} <$reveal state=<> type="match" text="show">  Done! \end
<$button actions={{$:/xp/ui/Actions/new-checklist}} tooltip="Create a new checklist" aria-label="new checklist" class="tc-btn-invisible tc-btn-mini"> {{$:/core/images/new-button}} new checklist 　(<$count filter='[tag!has[draft.of]]'/> tiddlers)
